purpose: Evidence for SNR degradation, coding gain, Rayleigh extension, and all Level 3 advanced modules.

advanced_high_snr_result.description: All advanced modules: adaptive modulation, convolutional Viterbi, OFDM, and MRC2 diversity.

scenarios.awgn-uncoded: Ablation study: disables FEC to show coding gain.
scenarios.rayleigh-coded: Level 3 fading-channel extension with one-tap equalization.
scenarios.ofdm: Split Level 3 evidence: OFDM with FFT 64 and cyclic prefix 16.
scenarios.diversity-mrc2: Split Level 3 evidence: two-branch Rayleigh MRC receive diversity.
scenarios.conv-viterbi: Split Level 3 evidence: convolutional coding with Viterbi decoding.
scenarios.adaptive-mod: Split Level 3 evidence: SNR-based adaptive BPSK/QPSK/16-QAM modulation.
scenarios.advanced-all: All advanced modules: adaptive modulation, convolutional Viterbi, OFDM, and MRC2 diversity.
